mapper.sql: g.id, g.user_id, g.title, g.description, g.price, g.category, g.pics, g.status, g.create_time
, u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.credit_score AS seller_credit_score
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods (user_id, title, description, price, category, pics, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{category}, #{pics}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM goods g LEFT JOIN user u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM goods WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND title = #{title} AND status != 2
